sets.name: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
sets.description: 45 essential cloud computing terms every IT professional should know — service models, networking, DevOps, security, and cost.

sets.name: AWS Solutions Architect Associate
sets.description: 10 key AWS services and concepts that appear on the SAA-C03 exam — compute, storage, networking, and architecture.

sets.name: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Microsoft Azure concepts covered in the AZ-900 certification — cloud services, identity, networking, and pricing.

sets.name: Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Azure AI and machine learning concepts for the AI-900 certification — ML types, Cognitive Services, and Responsible AI.

sets.name: Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Azure data and analytics concepts for the DP-900 certification — relational, NoSQL, ETL, streaming, and Power BI.

sets.name: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Microsoft 365 concepts for the MS-900 certification — Teams, SharePoint, Intune, Defender, and licensing.

sets.name: Security, Compliance & Identity (SC-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Microsoft security, compliance, and identity concepts for the SC-900 certification — Zero Trust, Sentinel, Purview, and MFA.

sets.name: Power Platform Fundamentals (PL-900)
sets.description: 10 foundational Microsoft Power Platform concepts for the PL-900 certification — Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, and Dataverse.

sets.name: Dynamics 365 Fundamentals CRM (MB-910)
sets.description: 10 foundational Dynamics 365 customer engagement and CRM concepts for the MB-910 certification — Sales, Service, Field Service, and Marketing.

sets.name: Dynamics 365 Fundamentals ERP (MB-920)
sets.description: 10 foundational Dynamics 365 finance and operations ERP concepts for the MB-920 certification — Finance, Supply Chain, Commerce, and HR.
